name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services through physical store locations across multiple states.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating through a network of physical retail locations. The company has been serving consumers seeking quick access to emergency funds and various financial services for an extended period, with store locations mentioned in multiple states including Colorado, California, and Louisiana. Their primary focus is on providing rapid access to cash through multiple product offerings designed for consumers facing immediate financial needs or lacking access to traditional banking services.

The company offers a diverse portfolio of financial services beyond emergency loans. Their service menu includes installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, tax services, business services, and credit cards. This multi-service approach positions ACE as a one-stop financial services provider for consumers who may need various financial products. The website indicates they also provide online loan options, suggesting some digital accessibility alongside their physical store network.

ACE Cash Express distinguishes itself through its extensive physical store presence and breadth of services offered under one brand. Rather than specializing in a single product, they have built a comprehensive financial services platform that can address multiple consumer needs—from emergency cash access to check cashing to tax preparation. Their customer service infrastructure includes dedicated phone lines and email support for both general inquiries and online loan operations.

A significant limitation evidenced by the website data is that specific product availability varies substantially by state and location. The repeated "this type of loan is not available in this state" messaging indicates that consumers cannot assume all advertised services are accessible in their area. Additionally, the 404 errors on location-specific pages suggest inconsistent website maintenance. For consumers considering ACE, direct contact with their customer service team is essential to confirm product availability and specific terms in their state.
address: 2064 S Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80916

company_info.headquarters: 2064 S Academy Blvd, Colorado Springs, CO 80916

pros: Multiple service offerings under one brand including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, and money transfers
Physical store network providing in-person service accessibility across multiple states
Same-day or next-day funding options available for emergency cash needs
Online loan application options in addition to physical store access
Dedicated customer service phone lines and email support for inquiries
Business services available for small business owners needing cash flow solutions
Tax services offered, providing additional financial support during tax season
cons: Product availability is highly restricted by state and location—many services unavailable in certain states as indicated by persistent error messaging
Website navigation issues with broken location pages (404 errors) make it difficult to research specific store services and details
No specific information provided on the website regarding APR rates, fees, or loan terms to enable consumer comparison
Physical store dependency means customers must visit in person for many services, limiting accessibility for some consumers
As a title loan and installment loan provider, the company operates in a heavily regulated industry with variable consumer protections
best_for: Consumers in states where ACE operates who need emergency cash access and prefer in-person transactions
Small business owners seeking quick funding or business-related financial services in states with service availability
Individuals who need bundled services like check cashing, bill payment, and money transfers in a single location
Consumers who have difficulty accessing traditional banking services and need title loan options
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers who need rapid access to emergency cash or financial services and have physical access to one of their store locations in a state where their products are available. The critical caveat is that service availability varies dramatically by geography—consumers must verify with ACE directly whether specific products are offered in their state, as many services show as unavailable in certain locations.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
